summary: Financial analyst specializing in Excel modeling, valuation, and compliance reporting for $500M+ AUM portfolios.

bullets: Built DCF and LBO models in Excel for 15+ M&A transactions totaling $2.4B in enterprise value with <2% variance vs closing
Automated monthly compliance reporting using VBA and SQL, reducing preparation time from 12 hours to 90 minutes per cycle
Prepared board-ready variance analyses for $500M+ AUM client portfolios, improving forecast accuracy by 18% over 4 quarters
Conducted credit risk analysis on 40+ fixed-income instruments using Bloomberg and Excel, supporting $120M allocation decisions for institutional clients

achievements.description: Dean's List all semesters; Led Wharton Investment Club portfolio (+14% vs benchmark)
